stemHtml: You are manually flying the aircraft using the FD, when suddenly the command bars disappear from the ADI. What should you do?

options.a: Wait for a caution on the FMA before reverting to manual control.
options.b: Disengage the FD and immediately engage the autopilot to take over.
options.c: Check for an FD caution light on the FMA and possibly disengage the FD.
options.d: Manually fly the aircraft because this indicates that the autopilot is not available.
